name_en: 【Haiyuan Ex-Factory Exclusive Real Owner Sale Chip Version】M24723 Woven Raffia Square Bag Series ONTHEGO Medium Handbag This OnTheGo Gx Medium handbag is from the LV By The Pool series, featuring a tote structure woven from raffia. It can accommodate a 13-inch laptop and beach towels. Riveted corners are finished with calfskin, complementing the round Louis Vuitton Paris patch.

Size: 37.5 x 30 x 17 cm
